description: You are a sustainability specialist conducting a building electrification retrofit study on the '4StoreyBuilding' project in eQUEST. Convert the heating source for the five Middle Floor packaged single-zone HVAC systems (M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25) from gas furnaces to air-source heat pumps. For each system, set the Heat Source (HEAT-SOURCE) to 'Heat Pump', the Heating EIR (HEATING-EIR) to 0.30488 (representing a COP of 3.28), the Min HP Temp (MIN-HP-T) to 17°F, and the Supp Heat Source (HP-SUPP-SOURCE) to 'Electric'. Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation to quantify the energy impact and save the project.
